fields.label: Metric Name
fields.description: Display name of the buyer KPI metric (e.g., Total Spend, Order Frequency)

fields.label: Metric Code
fields.description: Unique identifier code for programmatic use (e.g., TOTAL_SPEND, ORDER_FREQ)

fields.label: Metric Type
fields.options:
Count
Sum
Average
Percentage
Ratio
Rate
Score
Custom

fields.label: Weight
fields.description: Weight of this metric in overall score calculation (all weights must sum to 100)

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: Whether this KPI metric is currently active

fields.label: Threshold Type
fields.options:
Higher is Better
Lower is Better
Range
Exact
fields.description: How to interpret the threshold values

fields.label: Warning Threshold
fields.description: Value at which to show warning (below target but not critical)

fields.label: Critical Threshold
fields.description: Value at which to flag as critical/failing

fields.label: Scoring Method
fields.options:
Linear
Step
Logarithmic
Exponential
Binary
Custom
fields.description: Method for calculating score from metric value

fields.label: Max Score
fields.description: Maximum score this metric can contribute

fields.label: Invert Score
fields.description: Invert score calculation (for metrics where lower is better)

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description of what this metric measures
